==={{aniseries|DP}}===
Zoey debuted in ''[[DP011|Mounting a Coordinator Assault!]]'', where she quickly made friends with {{an|Dawn}} after returning the choker Dawn had misplaced. At that point, Zoey had already competed in three Contests and won one. She was the first contestant to appeal in the [[Jubilife City]] [[Pokémon Contest]], and the presentation of her {{p|Misdreavus}} was enough to take her to the [[Contest Battle|Battle Round]]. In the [[DP012|following episode]], she defeated {{Ash}}, Dawn, and [[Jessie|Jessilina]] with her {{TP|Zoey|Glameow}}, winning the Jubilife Contest and earning her second [[Ribbon]]. Later in ''[[DP026|Getting the Pre-Contest Titters!]]'' it was revealed that Zoey's first Ribbon had been won in a battle against [[Kenny's Prinplup]]. She has a [[Contest Pass]] for the [[Sinnoh]] [[region]].

In ''[[DP034|Buizel Your Way Out Of This!]]'' Zoey ran into Dawn and her friends, who were fishing in a lake on the way to [[Hearthome City]]. She told them that she had lost her last Contest and was taking a break. After failing to catch a {{p|Buizel}}, Zoey said that she would continue fishing at the lake to try to obtain a {{type|Water}} {{OBP|Pokémon|species}}.

In ''[[DP041|A Stand-Up Sit-Down!]]'', Zoey sprained her ankle and could not make the walk back to her camp site. Fortunately, Dawn and her friends were able to help her up and take her there. Upon arriving, Zoey introduced the group her {{TP|Zoey|Shellos}}, which was {{pkmn2|caught}} in the same lake Dawn had caught {{AP|Buizel}}. She also showed Dawn a video of a [[Double Performance]] and shared that the upcoming Hearthome Contest would use the format. When Jessilina appeared and challenged Dawn to a battle, Zoey decided to fight instead. She was able to defeat Jessilina using beautiful and effective [[Contest combination|combinations]].

In ''[[DP049|Dawn's Early Night!]]'', Zoey met Dawn once more and also met [[Nando]] for the first time. When Nando revealed his decision to participate in both {{pkmn|Contest}}s and [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}}s, Zoey became angry and said he needed to make up his mind. Zoey made it to the finals of the Hearthome Contest but lost. She was upset for not only her loss but also that she was unable to beat someone who was not "fully dedicated" to Contests in her eyes.

Zoey was the main reason why Ash and Dawn [[trade]]d their {{AP|Aipom}} and {{TP|Dawn|Buizel}}. In ''[[DP012|Arrival of a Rival!]]'', she told Dawn to raise Aipom after learning that Ash only entered the Jubilife City Pokémon Contest because Aipom wanted to take a shot at it. In ''[[DP055|Throwing the Track Switch]]'', she suggested that Ash and Dawn should trade their Pokémon with one another. She brought up that Aipom was more interested in competing in Contests instead of battling and vice versa for Buizel. After practicing with each other's Pokémon, they eventually agreed and did the trade.

In ''[[DP077|Staging a Heroes' Welcome!]]'', Zoey entered the [[Wallace Cup]]. It was revealed that she had caught a {{p|Finneon}}, and the performance given by the {{pkmn|category|Wing Fish Pokémon}} took her to the Battle Stage. In ''[[DP079|Strategy with a Smile!]]'', she lost to {{an|May}} in the semifinals of the event.
[[File:Candice and Zoey.png|thumb|left|250px|Zoey and Candice]]
In ''[[DP126|Classroom Training!]]'', Zoey welcomed Dawn and her friends to her [[hometown]], [[Snowpoint City]]. She was showing the town to them when [[Candice]], the [[Snowpoint Gym]] [[Gym Leader|Leader]], came up and joined them. It was revealed that Candice is a childhood friend of Zoey and that they went to the same school. Because of this, Zoey often calls her "Miss Senior". She also appeared in ''[[DP127|Sliding Into Seventh!]]'', watching Ash's Gym battle with Candice, and again in ''[[DP128|A Pyramiding Rage!]]'', where she watched [[Paul]]'s battle against {{an|Brandon}}. She left at the end of the episode with Candice.

In ''[[DP155|Double-Time Battle Training!]]'', Zoey was shown winning her fifth and final [[Ribbon]] required for the [[Grand Festival]]. She, along with Candice, helped Dawn train for the {{to|Daybreak}} Contest and the two had a [[Double Battle]] with Zoey winning. In ''[[DP161|Yes in Dee Dee, It's Dawn!]]'', she and Candice were seen watching Dawn's performance on TV from Snowpoint City.

[[File:Zoey and Dawn.png|thumb|250px|Zoey and Dawn in the Grand Festival]]
Zoey entered the [[Sinnoh Grand Festival]] in ''[[DP174|Last Call — First Round!]]'', where it was revealed that her {{p|Shellos}} and {{p|Finneon}} had evolved into {{TP|Zoey|Gastrodon}} and {{p|Lumineon}}, respectively. Using these two Pokémon, she managed to pass the [[appeal|Performance Stage]] by making use of Gastrodon and Lumineon's Water-type attacks in the [[Contest Hall]]'s pool. In the [[DP175|next episode]], she won her first battle at the event, advancing to the Top 16. In ''[[DP176|Coming Full-Festival Circle!]]'', she battled Nando in the semifinals with her {{p|Mismagius}} and {{p|Leafeon}} and managed to win the match.

In ''[[DP177|A Grand Fight for Winning!]]'', she found herself up against Dawn in the final round. The two had a hard-fought battle, with Zoey's Glameow and {{p|Gallade}} against [[Dawn's Piplup]] and {{TP|Dawn|Togekiss}}. It was clear that the battle could go either way, but when the time ran out, Zoey won by one point. Having won the Grand Festival, she was awarded the [[Ribbon Cup]] as well as the title of [[Top Coordinator]]. After the competition, she told Dawn that she was going back to Snowpoint City, where Candice was waiting for her with a party to celebrate her victory. She invited Dawn to the party, but Dawn refused saying that she wanted to cheer for Ash in the [[Lily of the Valley Conference|Sinnoh League]]. Zoey then said goodbye and left.

She made a cameo appearance in the ending credits of ''[[M13|Zoroark: Master of Illusions]]''. She and her Glameow were shown taking shelter from the rain inside a log.
